zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Gleason III於1609年1月1日出生在英國素福爾可考費爾德時，他的父親Thomas Gleason II36歲，母親Ann Armesby36歲。他於1636年4月與Susanna Page在英國諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1686年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其享年77歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可坎布利其笛卡爾 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Gleason III于1609年1月1日出生在英国素福爾可考費爾德时，他的父亲Thomas Gleason II36岁，母亲Ann Armesby36岁。他于1636年4月与Susanna Page在英国諾薩普頓史爾素爾格拉福结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1686年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可坎布利其享年77岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可坎布利其笛卡爾 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Gleason
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Waterford): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Glasáin, from a diminutive of glas ‘green, blue, gray’.

variants.name: Glasheen
meanings: Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Glaisín,based on a diminutive of glas ‘green, blue, gray’. Compare Gleason .

variants.name: Glisan
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Irish   Gleason  . This surname is concentrated in IL and PA.

variants.name: Gleeson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donal, Siobhan, Brendan, Conor.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest grave in the memorial list

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Gleason III was born on 1 January 1609, in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Gleason II, was 36 and his mother, Ann Armesby, was 36. He married Susanna Page in April 1636, in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1686, in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 77, and was buried in Old Burying Ground, Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Gleason III est né le 1 janvier 1609, à Cockfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Gleason II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ann Armesby, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Susanna Page en avril 1636, à Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1686, à Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Old Burying Ground, Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Gleason III am 1. Januar 1609 in Cockfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Gleason II 36 und seine Mutter Ann Armesby 36. Er hat im April 1636 in Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England Susanna Page geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1686 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Burying Ground, Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gleason III è nato il il 1 gennaio 1609 nel Cockfield, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Gleason II, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Ann Armesby, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Susanna Page nel aprile 1636, nel Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1686, nel Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Burying Ground, Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Gleason IIIが1609年1月1日にイギリススフォルクコクフィールドで生まれた時，父Thomas Gleason IIは36歳，母Ann Armesbyは36歳であった。1636年4月にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスルグラブでSusanna Pageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1686年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスカンブリッジで77歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスカンブリッジオルド ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Gleason III(이)가 1609년 1월 1일 영국 수폴크 콕필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Gleason II(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Armesby(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1636년 4월 영국 노르섬프토실르 설그레이브에서 Susanna Page(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1686년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 캄브리지 드 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gleason III nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1609, em Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Gleason II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ann Armesby, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Susanna Page em abril de 1636, em Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1686, em Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Burying Ground, Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Gleason III родился 1 января 1609 г. в местности коккфиелд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Gleason II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Armesby, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Page апрель 1636 г. в местности сулграв, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1686 г. в местности камбридж, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности олд буринг гроунд, камбридж, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Gleason III nació el 1 de enero de 1609, en Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Gleason II, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ann Armesby, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Susanna Page en abril de 1636, en Sulgrave, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1686, en Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Old Burying Ground, Cambridge, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
